title: Pipeline Relay Decision - Apply or Cancel
description: Human-in-the-loop approval gate at Phase 5 (Relay). The operator reviews execution context, diff statistics, resolved/unresolved items, and risk summary before deciding to Apply (release to real target) or Cancel (restore from snapshot).

fallback.description: Action Center serves as the fallback decision channel when the Operator Dashboard is unreachable or disconnected for more than 5 seconds.

case_id.title: Case ID
case_id.description: Correlation case identifier linking BPMN process, API Workflow, and Edge execution.

pipeline_phase.title: Pipeline Phase
pipeline_phase.description: Current pipeline phase (always Phase 5 Relay for this action).

resolved_count.title: Resolved Items
resolved_count.description: Number of issues successfully resolved during simulation and inspection.

unresolved_count.title: Unresolved Items
unresolved_count.description: Number of issues that remain unresolved (information_unavailable or blocked).

diff_stats.title: Diff Statistics
diff_stats.description: Summary of changes between Snapshot (original) and Candidate Copy (proposed).

files_changed.title: Files Changed
files_changed.description: Total number of files modified in the candidate copy.

lines_added.title: Lines Added
lines_added.description: Total lines added across all changed files.

lines_removed.title: Lines Removed
lines_removed.description: Total lines removed across all changed files.

risk_summary.title: Risk Summary
risk_summary.description: Human-readable summary of risk factors including unresolved items, scope of changes, and any isolation outcomes that could not be resolved.

result_hash.title: Result Hash
result_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the approved simulation result for verification at apply time.

target_path.title: Target Path
target_path.description: Path to the real target folder that will be modified on Apply.

reviewer_comment.title: Reviewer Comment
reviewer_comment.description: Optional comment from the reviewer explaining the decision rationale.

outcomes.description: Operator decision outcomes. Apply releases the simulation-proven result to the real target folder. Cancel restores from the Phase 0 snapshot.
